did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper is a review study that identifies research gaps and discusses future directions for integrating AI in melanoma diagnosis. It does not use AI, machine learning, or deep learning to obtain its own study results; rather, it synthesizes existing literature and proposes validation of AI technologies as a future goal.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
